parameters.content:
### Hourly Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — every 1 h. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Normalize Post Payload

### Normalize Post Payload

Custom JavaScript: Normalize incoming post records to a stable schema

Next: Build the Brief

### Build the Brief

Shapes the item: writes `brief`, `tone`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Draft with AI Writer

### Draft with AI Writer

Single fixed LLM step (no tool choice) — cheaper and more predictable than an agent.

Ports: ①→ Refine with AI Editor · ②→ Capture Failure Context

⚠ failures exit via the error rail

### OpenRouter Writer Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Draft with AI Writer** as `languageModel`

🔑 OpenRouter API key

### Refine with AI Editor

Single fixed LLM step (no tool choice) — cheaper and more predictable than an agent.

Ports: ①→ Publish Draft to WordPress · ②→ Capture Failure Context

⚠ failures exit via the error rail

### OpenRouter Editor Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Refine with AI Editor** as `languageModel`

🔑 OpenRouter API key

### Publish Draft to WordPress

wordpress — `action` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Guard Non-Empty content · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 WordPress credentials

### Guard Non-Empty content

Drops items that fail the condition; only qualifying items continue (no false branch).

Next: Tag Pipeline Metadata

### Tag Pipeline Metadata

Shapes the item: writes `pipeline`, `version`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Cap Batch Volume

### Cap Batch Volume

Caps the stream at 50 items to protect downstream quotas.

Next: Sort Posts Newest First

### Sort Posts Newest First

Orders items (newest first) so limits and digests pick the most relevant records.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (Airtable)

### Append Audit Row (Airtable)

airtable — `create` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Send Summary to Slack · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Airtable PAT

### Send Summary to Slack

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Slack

### Escalate Failure to Slack

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

# Auto-post social posts with Airtable and WordPress end to end

**Pattern:** Social Scheduler · **Level:** Advanced · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Auto-post social posts with Airtable and WordPress end to end. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual listening is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Hourly Schedule → Normalize Post Payload → Build the Brief → Draft with AI Writer → Refine with AI Editor → Publish Draft to WordPress → Guard Non-Empty content → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to social scheduler without manual effort
- Anyone automating listening in marketing
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Saves hours of manual work each week
- Standardizes the process every time
- Scales without extra headcount

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Airtable PAT; OpenRouter API key; Slack OAuth2; WordPress credentials.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛟 Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3× with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail → context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your listening process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
